news.title:
Reliance Retail sold its 100% stake in RPPMSL for ₹274 crore to Jaipur Enclave Pvt Ltd.
Shares of Reliance Industries ended at ₹1,314.55, down 2.6% on the BSE.
news.summary:
Reliance Retail sold its 100% stake in RPPMSL for ₹274 crore to Jaipur Enclave Pvt Ltd.
Shares of Reliance Industries ended at ₹1,314.55, down 2.6% on the BSE.

news.title:
Reliance Retail sold a 100% stake in a subsidiary for Rs. 274 crore.
The subsidiary contributed 0.06% to turnover and 0.04% to net worth.
news.summary:

news.title:
Govt hiked windfall tax on diesel and ATF exports, impacting IOC, BPCL, HPCL, and Reliance shares.
Delhi's draft EV policy may boost Ather, Ola, TVS, Bajaj Auto, Hero MotoCorp as it mandates EV adoption by 2028.
news.summary:

Delhi's draft EV policy may boost Ather, Ola, TVS, Bajaj Auto, Hero MotoCorp as it mandates EV adoption by 2028.

news.title:
Dharmesh Shah of ICICI Sec suggests buying Reliance and Titan shares, targets Rs 1,480 and Rs 4,900.
Sensex surged 918.6 pts, Nifty rose 275.5 pts on Apr 10, driven by banking stocks, global trends, and falling crude prices.
news.summary:
Dharmesh Shah of ICICI Sec suggests buying Reliance and Titan shares, targets Rs 1,480 and Rs 4,900.
Sensex surged 918.6 pts, Nifty rose 275.5 pts on Apr 10, driven by banking stocks, global trends, and falling crude prices.

news.title:
8 of India's top 10 firms added ₹4.13 lakh crore market cap; HDFC, ICICI led gains.
Reliance stayed top-valued; Infosys, Reliance saw mcap erosion amid Sensex, Nifty surge.
news.summary:
8 of India's top 10 firms added ₹4.13 lakh crore market cap; HDFC, ICICI led gains.

news.title:
Diesel export tax hike may align prices between state OMCs and private firms.
OMCs like IOCL, BPCL, HPCL procure diesel from private refiners like RIL, Nayara.
news.summary:
Diesel export tax hike may align prices between state OMCs and private firms.
OMCs like IOCL, BPCL, HPCL procure diesel from private refiners like RIL, Nayara.

news.title:
Reliance seeks govt approval to import Iranian crude before US waiver deadline.
The move aims to ensure compliance with US sanctions and Indian laws.
news.summary:
Reliance seeks govt approval to import Iranian crude before US waiver deadline.
The move aims to ensure compliance with US sanctions and Indian laws.

news.title:
Shipping ministry allows four Iranian oil tankers to berth for Reliance.
India hasn't imported Iranian oil since May 2019 due to U.S. pressure.
news.summary:
Shipping ministry allows four Iranian oil tankers to berth for Reliance.
India hasn't imported Iranian oil since May 2019 due to U.S. pressure.

news.title:
ICICI Direct recommends Bajaj Auto and Reliance Industries for 3-month gains of up to 12% and 11% respectively.
Both stocks show strong technical setups, favorable risk-reward, and momentum indicators supporting trend reversals.
news.summary:
ICICI Direct recommends Bajaj Auto and Reliance Industries for 3-month gains of up to 12% and 11% respectively.

news.summary: Bombay High Court rules Mumbai Metro Authority's INR 1,100 Cr demand on Reliance is invalid.

news.title:
Jio-bp limits diesel sales to 50 litres/day per customer amid supply crunch.
The cap could affect transporters, including fleet operators of trucks and buses.
news.summary:

news.title:
Reliance Industries limits fuel purchases to $11 per pump amid shortages.
Middle East crisis affects supply; tentative ceasefire offers slight relief.
news.summary:
Reliance Industries limits fuel purchases to $11 per pump amid shortages.
Middle East crisis affects supply; tentative ceasefire offers slight relief.

news.title:
OMCs' Q4FY26 EBITDA sees gains from inventory, GRMs; quarterly dip due to weak marketing margins.
RIL's EBITDA to grow 11% YoY; ONGC's and Oil India's EBITDA to rise 16-36% QoQ on higher Brent prices.
news.summary:
OMCs' Q4FY26 EBITDA sees gains from inventory, GRMs; quarterly dip due to weak marketing margins.
RIL's EBITDA to grow 11% YoY; ONGC's and Oil India's EBITDA to rise 16-36% QoQ on higher Brent prices.

news.title:
Crude prices drop $15 after Iran-US ceasefire, easing fuel price pressures. OMCs' diesel losses shrink from ₹52 to ₹22/litre.
Reliance, IOCL, BPCL, HPCL benefit from lower crude costs, boosting margins. LPG losses drop 30%, easing subsidy concerns.
news.summary:
Crude prices drop $15 after Iran-US ceasefire, easing fuel price pressures. OMCs' diesel losses shrink from ₹52 to ₹22/litre.
Reliance, IOCL, BPCL, HPCL benefit from lower crude costs, boosting margins. LPG losses drop 30%, easing subsidy concerns.

news.title:
Reliance Retail ranks 7th among top 100 global VC-backed private firms.
The company holds a valuation exceeding $100B, per Stanford GSB study.
news.summary:

news.title:
PL Capital expects subdued Q4 FY26 for the oil & gas sector amid Middle East disruptions, with 7% QoQ sales growth but Ebitda and PAT down 10.5% and 17.6%.
Upstream firms like ONGC may see 19.7% Ebitda growth, while OMCs and CGD firms face steep declines. Reliance shows mixed results due to cost pressures.
news.summary:
PL Capital expects subdued Q4 FY26 for the oil & gas sector amid Middle East disruptions, with 7% QoQ sales growth but Ebitda and PAT down 10.5% and 17.6%.
Upstream firms like ONGC may see 19.7% Ebitda growth, while OMCs and CGD firms face steep declines. Reliance shows mixed results due to cost pressures.

news.title:

The gain follows three days of decline, raising questions of recovery or technical bounce.
news.summary:
